description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!  Product DetailsCase style: Digital watch with a stainless steel round black caseStrap style: Black textured plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Date and day display on the dial, has alarm chrono and four screws to reset time and other multiple featuresWaterproof to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 32 mmCase thickness: 7 mm
